title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at ET Money

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at ET Money
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
